{{CargoRelic
|name=Goldfish Gohei
|class_id=20742
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=A sacred relic of the Goldfish Clan, this ancient scepter has been imbued with generations of ritualistic mana through countless ceremonies. Simply wielding it disperses evil spirits, making it a powerful tool against darkness.
|fame=18
|art=15
|fth=28
|civ=13
|tech=16
|ss1=prop@55053_2<br>prop@55058_2
|ss2=prop@55053_2<br>prop@55058_2
|ss3=prop@55053_2<br>prop@55058_2
|ss4=prop@55053_2<br>prop@55058_2
|ss7=prop@55053_2<br>prop@55058_2<br> (Awakened)
}}
